response.original_title: Las grandes maniobras de tiro real de la artillería llevadas a cabo el 8 de febrero en la pampa de San Juan
response.overview: Today, this company [referring to the Cinema Theater Company] premieres in its main locations the magnificent film of the military maneuvers carried out last Friday in the fields of Villa and San Juan.  The company's photographer, Mr. Goitizolo, and his assistants marched on foot alongside the troops who were carrying out the attack on the fortified village, and upon which the artillery fire supporting said attack was directed. The explosions of the bombs can be seen in some parts of the film.  This film is of real interest, and we have no doubt that the graphic depiction it presents of the brilliant maneuvers recently carried out will draw the Lima public to the Cinema Theater.
response.title: Las grandes maniobras de tiro real de la artillería llevadas a cabo el 8 de febrero en la pampa de San Juan
